name: Ved Panse
headline: I build ideas all the
about: I am a junior at the University of California and an incoming summer intern at Apple. My work and interest covers agentic AI, embodied AI, and core compilers. I like to participate in fast-paced coding sessions (which is why you'll find me doing a lot of hackathons). In my free time, I usually sit at the Wong Avery Library, trying to boot a simulated IBM-7094 to run Eliza, or learning COBOL for no practical reason.
